CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLANUEVA, EVENECEL AN INDIVIDUAL VILLANUEVA, MAURICIO AN INDIVIDUAL ORTEGA, MARIA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK'S DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, WITH 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES VIOLATION OF CCC 2923.5. DEFENDANT'S MINIMAL COMPLIANCE WITH CCC 2923.5 (CONTACT AND SOME ANALYSIS OF THE BORROWER'S FINANCIAL SITUATION) IS NOT ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT AND DOES NOT APPEAR IN THE JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE DOCUMENTS. AT MOST EX. F TO DEFENDANT'S RJN SHOWS THAT PARTIES CONTEMPLATED SUCH CONTACT AND ANALYSIS TO OCCUR. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES STANDING UNDER UCL AND PLAINTIFF'S DEFAULT PRIOR TO THE ALLEGED VIOLATIONS IN NOT ALLEGED IN COMPLAINT. SEE JENKINS V. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK (2013) 216 CAL.APP.4TH 497. DEFENDANT'S ARGUMENTS ARE MORE APPROPRIATE FOR A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT ORDER PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1312(B) = (501/AJR/RG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Continued To Sep-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK's DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, with 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges violation of CCC 2923.5. Defendant's minimal compliance with CCC 2923.5 (contact and some analysis of the borrower's financial situation) is not alleged in the complaint and does not appear in the judicially noticeable documents. At most Ex. F to Defendant's RJN shows that parties contemplated such contact and analysis to occur. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges standing under UCL and Plaintiff's default prior to the alleged violations in not alleged in complaint. See Jenkins v. JP Morgan Chase Bank (2013) 216 Cal.App.4th 497. Defendant's arguments are more appropriate for a Motion for Summary Judgment. Prevailing party is to prepare and submit order pursuant to CRC 3.1312(b) = (501/AJR/rg)
